CustomField.description:
Completed by the line manager during or after the half-year review with the individual, a short commentary on progress.
Any changes to the annual objectives (additions, removals, changes to measures or timing) agreed at the 6-month review should be signed-off by the line manager here.
Specific actions agreed in the half-year review may be documented here
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Completed by the line manager during or after the half-year review with the individual, a short commentary on progress.
CustomField.label: Half-Year Review - Reviewer Comments
